headline: Is Steel Dynamics (STLD) Still Fairly Priced After Its 109% One Year Surge?
summary: Wondering if Steel Dynamics at US$268.34 is still reasonably priced after a strong run, or if you are turning up late to the story? This breakdown focuses squarely on what you are paying versus what you are getting. The stock has pulled back about 2.5% over the last week, but it is still up 13.7% over 30 days, 52.4% year to date and 109.2% over the past year. That naturally raises questions about how much future upside or downside is already in the price. Recent headlines have focused on...
